channel.title: Publications on Manita Pote
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Manita Pote

item.title: Coordinated Campaigns and Information Integrity During the 2023 Israel-Hamas War on Twitter
item.description: This study uncovers how coordinated campaigns shaped the information environment on Twitter during the 2023 Israel-Hamas War, analyzing 4.5 million tweets across 11 coordinated groups using multimodal methods.

item.title: Coordinated Reply Attacks in Influence Operations: Characterization and Detection
item.description: This study presents a framework to detect the user accounts involved in coordinated attack on targets based on replies/comments.

item.title: Labeled Datasets for Research on Information Operations
item.description: This paper presents labeled datasets covering 26 information operation campaigns to support development and benchmarking of IO detection algorithms.

item.title: Survey on Embedding Models for Knowledge Graph and its Applications
item.description: A survey of knowledge graph embedding models covering translation-based and neural network-based approaches and their applications.

item.title: Computational Propaganda Theory and Bot Detection System: Critical Literature Review
item.description: A critical literature review of computational propaganda theory and bot detection systems on social media platforms.

item.title: A Multi-Platform Collection of Social Media Posts about the 2022 U.S. Midterm Elections
item.description: This paper introduces MEIU22, a multi-platform dataset of social media posts about the 2022 U.S. Midterm Elections spanning Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Reddit, and 4chan.

item.title: Manipulating Twitter Through Deletions
item.description: Presents a method to estimate user deletion behavior on social media and investigates online manipulation tactics observed through deletion patterns, revealing coordinated inauthentic activity on Twitter.
